title: Sending Photos
drDigitalIntro: You can send photos through Messages. Click the + button and choose from your Photos app or take a new photo. Add a caption if you like, then send. The other person receives the photo instantly. Photos through Messages can be edited with effects before sending. This is how people share memories with family and friends instantly.
drDigitalSuccess: You can share photos instantly with anyone!
drDigitalHint: Photos in messages can be edited with effects before sending.
